_comment: BERT bert-base-uncased WordPiece reference token ids for FClaireonWordPieceTokenizer. ids include [CLS]=101 ... [SEP]=102, UNPADDED. Generated by an independent implementation of the documented greedy-longest-match algorithm against the committed vocab.txt (Plugins/Claireon/Resources/Models/bge-small-en-v1.5-int8/vocab.txt). WordPiece output is fully determined by the vocab, so these equal the HuggingFace BertTokenizerFast result for these ASCII, punctuation-free inputs. To extend: add a row and regenerate via the same greedy algorithm against the vocab.
